mapper.select: SELECT notice_no AS noticeNo, writer_no AS writerNo, notice_type AS noticeType, title, content, hit, reg_date AS regDate, update_date AS updateDate FROM notice ORDER BY notice_no DESC
SELECT notice_no AS noticeNo, writer_no AS writerNo, notice_type AS noticeType, title, content, hit, reg_date AS regDate, update_date AS updateDate FROM notice WHERE notice_no=#{noticeNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice(writer_no, notice_type, title, content, hit, reg_date) VALUES(COALESCE(#{writerNo}, 1), #{noticeType}, #{title}, #{content}, 0, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE notice SET writer_no=#{writerNo}, notice_type=#{noticeType}, title=#{title}, content=#{content}, hit=#{hit}, update_date=NOW() WHERE notice_no=#{noticeNo}
